Description: Draft feature for computing deterministic or model-based similarity inputs per day.

Stories.StoryDescription: Evaluate local signals such as timestamps, color histograms, or simple visual descriptors.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: A local baseline exists for similarity grouping experiments.

Stories.StoryDescription: Evaluate whether a local or cloud-based embedding model should be used for richer grouping.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a candidate embedding extraction approach for comparison.
